The acclaimed Fikret Guliyev is a noted expert within fishery science and the author of the influential Ironseed Stabilizer Guide. His significant contributions have led to the receipt of the prestigious Dreamscribe Plaque, an honor reflecting his dedication. Additionally, Fikret's membership in the Velvet Scroll Makers connects him with a community of like-minded professionals. He has credited much of his success to the mentorship of Moshe Almog, who has played a crucial role in his academic development.
